info.longName: Innovator Power Buffer Step-Up Strategy ETF

funds_data.description: The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks to provide risk-managed investment exposure to the SPDR® S&P 500® ETF Trust (the “Underlying ETF”). The underlying ETF is an exchange-traded unit investment trust that uses a full replication strategy, meaning it invests entirely in the S&P 500® Index. The fund is non-diversified.
